description_long: This picnic table features a rectangular wooden tabletop with evenly spaced slats, supported by a robust black metal frame. Four benches, two on each long side, are attached to the frame and also constructed from wooden slats, providing ample seating. Each bench is equipped with a backrest made from matching wood, enhancing comfort for users. The supporting structure consists of angled metal legs and crossbeams, ensuring stability and durability. The overall design is utilitarian yet inviting, suitable for communal outdoor use. The materials and construction suggest it is built to withstand frequent use and exposure to the elements.
description: A sturdy rectangular picnic table with wooden slats, metal frame, and four attached benches with backrests. Designed for communal outdoor seating and durability.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full tabletop and all four benches with backrests clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the table, the bench with backrest in the foreground, and the supporting metal frame beneath.
description_view_2: Another top-down view similar to view 0, emphasizing the symmetry and arrangement of benches and table.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite end, again showing the bench with backrest and the sturdy frame structure.
attribute_tabletop_support_structure: The tabletop is supported by a black metal frame with angled legs and crossbeams that connect to the benches and provide structural stability.
